{{Infobox character
| name = Wei Mon Eri
| aliases = Eri
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Mon Eri]] is a ten-year-old girl and a [[Striker]] on the [[Path of the White Fox]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Mon Eri]] challenged Wei Shi [[Lindon]] to a duel of honor.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Eri is a member of the [[Mon family]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Eri was accepted into the [[Holy Wind School]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
